title: pleconax conica subsp. conoidea
intro: Pleconax conica subsp. conoidea, also known as Conocephalum conicum, is a species of liverwort, a small, non-vascular plant that belongs to the class Marchantiophyta. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Conocephalum conicum include its potential to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Conocephalum conicum is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for its herbal uses, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
